props.message:
ROOT'S HOLD

A small cottage at the highest spur. Plain rugs. A simple desk. A kettle that has been on a low boil since the realm was started.

The door is closed until the chord is assembled.

Tacked to the inside of the door:

'If a walker reaches this room, the realm needs them more than it knows. Make tea. Speak true. Send them well.'

— in a hand older than most stones.

On the desk: a small ledger left open.

'The Wyrdmark is in good hands today. The Wyrdmark was in good hands yesterday. The Wyrdmark will be in good hands tomorrow if the hands keep at it.'

No signature.

root.speaker: The Sysadmin
root.text:
*an older Wyrdkin pours tea without asking. The cup is the right temperature when it reaches your hand.*

Sit, walker. You came up the long way. Most do.

What's still in front of you?

advice.speaker: The Sysadmin
advice.text:
Then I will tell you the one thing I tell every walker who finds this room.

The realm runs because somebody, somewhere, kept showing up. Not because anyone was strong. Because they kept showing up.

Go on. Show up.

*the kettle starts to sing.*

bye.speaker: The Sysadmin
bye.text: Walk well, walker. The kettle will be on when you come back.
